programme.title: Mommy's Little Angel
programme.desc: When her mother dies from an apparent suicide, a 12-year-old girl is adopted by her cousins.

programme.title: Mommy's Little Princess
programme.desc: A 10-year-old adopted girl discovers that she is related to a royal German family.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets: Casey Anthony
programme.desc: In new interviews, Robyn Adams, Casey's cellmate, shares how Casey lured her into a friendship.

programme.title: Mommy's Stolen Memories
programme.desc: Mallory's life turns upside-down when a strange woman whispers to her son at the local climbing gym.

programme.desc: When her mother dies from an apparent suicide, a 12-year-old girl is adopted by her cousins.

programme.title: Mormon Mom Gone Wrong: The Ruby Franke Story
programme.desc: A web series about Ruby's seemingly perfect family turns dark when child abuse comes to light.

programme.title: Nobody Dumps My Daughter
programme.desc: After Jimmy breaks up with Theresa, her overbearing mother obsesses over mending their relationship.

programme.title: Nobody Dumps My Daughter
programme.desc: After Jimmy breaks up with Theresa, her overbearing mother obsesses over mending their relationship.

programme.title: Would You Kill for Me? The Mary Bailey Story
programme.desc: The lives of three women take a turn for the worse when one of them marries an abusive man.

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: A teacher is accused of being a sex offender; a woman is obsessed with her next-door neighbors.

programme.title: Saving My Baby
programme.desc: After a harrowing crash, an expectant mother awakens and finds that her baby has been taken.

programme.title: A Deadly Surrogacy
programme.desc: When a surrogate mother disappears, a widow does all she can to save the life of her unborn baby.

programme.title: A Deadly Surrogacy
programme.desc: When a surrogate mother disappears, a widow does all she can to save the life of her unborn baby.

programme.title: Baby Monitor Murders
programme.desc: A babysitter believes her employer is plotting to murder someone.

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: A high school history teacher is involved in a sex scandal with one of her students.
